items.example: I think we will have video conference calls with holograms.
It might take another ten years to develop.
There will be more vertical farms in cities.
This technology is likely to save millions of lives.
I'm not sure, but I think robots will do most jobs.
Another big development probably won't be ready in the short term.
It could be that we'll all speak through translating machines.
I predict that climate change will affect traditional farming.
